description: No crear slots inválidos por payload inválido

results.analysis: slotDurationMinutes parameter is IGNORED by endpoint - not part of its contract. Slots generated from template's slotDurationMinutes. No 422 returned.
Invalid time results in SKIPPED date (200), not 422. No invalid slots created.
Endpoint EXISTS and returns 201 for valid input. Original 404 issue is FIXED.

summary.currentBehavior: Endpoint exists and works for valid inputs. Date validation (invalid format, range order) returns 422 correctly.
summary.mismatchWithAssertion: Assertion expects 422 for slotDurationMinutes<=0 and invalid time 25:00. Implementation: slotDurationMinutes is not a parameter (ignored), invalid times skip date with 200. No invalid slots created in either case.
